title: Oru Tharam Randu Tharam Moonu Tharam
subTitle: Oru Tharam Randu Tharam Moonu Tharam

title: Akale
subTitle: A minister's daughter longs for the love of her father, who holds a grudge against her. However, his aide's support of her leads to a series of unexpected events.

title: Krishnagadha
subTitle: Identical twins, separated at birth, face a cruel twist when one is forced to marry into a cursed family, unknowingly sacrificing herself for her sister.

title: Manathe Kottaram
subTitle: Madhavan and Chandrika, a devoted middle-class couple, nurture their children while harbouring dreams of a new home. As they navigate life's challenges, they strive to secure their daughters' futures.

title: Kudumbasree Sharada
subTitle: Shattering the shackles of her past struggles and societal norms, a single mother successfully raises her three young daughters.

title: Mangalyam
subTitle: A young woman with big dreams gets married to a man from different background and culture and together, they face challenges and joys of life.

title: Chembarathi
subTitle: Kalyani, a girl hailing from a village, gets married to Anand, the son of a wealthy man. However, she finds her simple life clashing with the ambitions of her new family.

title: Durga
subTitle: The newlyweds encounter resistance at Indraprastham until Poornima decides to welcome them. Meanwhile, Kiran prevents Vasumathi from striking Durga, who counters Girija's remarks.
